summary: Solid PowerShell structure with clear function separation, but gaps in robustness reduce shipping readiness. Issues: (1) Helper functions ConvertTo-JsonReport/ConvertTo-MarkdownReport not marked private, causing namespace pollution. (2) No input validation—Secret object fields unchecked, date parsing uses [datetime]::Parse() which fails on malformed input; should use ParseExact() or validate format. (3) Workflow repeats parameter handling across runs (lines running mixed-secrets and expired-only)—could factor into composite action. (4) Test harness uses brittle substring matching on act output; relies on exact string presence rather than parsed structure. (5) Missing fixture files (.json) referenced by workflow. (6) Only 1 full test case implemented; requirements demand comprehensive act coverage. (7) actionlint installation downloads from GitHub releases—could use pre-built action for reliability.
